# About this item

- 1\. Perfect Fit for Audi A4 A5 2009-2015 with 3G MMI System: This CarPlay touchscreen for Audi A4 A5 is specially designed for Audi A4 / A5 2009-2015 equipped with factory 3G MMI system. Not compatible with 2G MMI system. Not for Audi Q5. Please note: our 12.3 inch screen version is shared for both A4 and A5, while the 8.9 inch screen versions for A4 and A5 are different models. Please compare your original dashboard, screen style, and system version before purchase to ensure correct fitment.
- 2\. 12.3" HD Touchscreen Display – Premium for Audi Screen Upgrade: Upgrade your dashboard with a premium 12.3-inch 1920×720 IPS for Audi touchscreen display upgrade.Delivers: Vivid color performance, Wide viewing angles, Ultra-slim bezel factory-style design.Perfect for a seamless for Audi dashboard screen upgrade with OEM-style integration.
- 3\. Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto Head Unit: Transform your original MMI system into car CarPlay head unit.Enjoy wireless CarPlay and Android Auto for navigation, calls, music, and apps via Siri or Google Assistant.A complete CarPlay retrofit solution for safer and smarter driving.
- 4\. Retain OEM MMI Functions, Seamless Integration:Keep all original car features including factory radio, amplifier, reverse camera, and MMI controls.Switch easily between original system and upgraded interface.This car head unit upgrade integrates perfectly with your OEM system.
- 5\. MirrorLink Function – Smartphone Screen Mirroring Support: Built-in MirrorLink support allows smartphone screen mirroring directly to your car display. Supports app display and media streaming. Enhances entertainment and navigation flexibility.Ideal for drivers seeking multifunction car stereo upgrade.
- 6\. Reverse Camera & Parking System Support: Supports multiple camera systems:OEM factory reverse camera, Aftermarket backup camera,Parking radar display integration.
- 7\. Professional Installation & Technical Support:Installation requires dashboard removal and wiring connection (standard for car stereo upgrade systems).Most issues are caused by incorrect wiring or system mismatch. Our technical team provides full support for troubleshooting. Pro Tip: Always test for Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and MirrorLink functions before reinstalling dashboard to avoid unnecessary returns.

## Product description

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/4408e05e-4933-4a4f-a682-82a4fce0a0f4.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Please note before purchase：

- 1\. Road Top 12.3 inch Ultra-Narrow Carplay Touchscreen fits for Audi A4 A5 with 3G MMI 2009-2015, does not fit for 2G MMI system. Does not fit for Q5 cars. If you need a touchscreen for another model, please search from our store. It's important to check the images on our website to make sure you have the correct model and system before you buy, and don't forget to ask for help if you're confused about this.
- 2\. The link sell for 12.3 inch Ultra-Narrow touchscreen with linux system, if you need 8.9 inch touchscreen, please get help via us or search from our store.
- 3\. Professional installation is recommended. Please know you need to take out the car dashboard to connect wires. No need to break any original wires.
- 4\. We advise confirming all features work before reassembling to avoid secondary disassembly.
- 5\. Most of the problems occur because of wrong cable connection and settings but we can fix them

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/6ae153db-0243-4a48-9dc2-3708e77251d2.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Road Top 12.3 Inch Car Radio Wireless CarPlay Android Auto Ultra-Narrow Touchscreen for Audi A4 A5 2009-2015 Year with 3GMMI

- Road Top brings a new technology to upgrade your car's original screen. It replaces factory car screen with a 12.3 inch car radio screen（for linux system）, that not only retains factory features, but also adds wireless Carplay, wireless Android Auto, mirrorlink and more Functions.
- 12.3 inch Ultra-Narrow original car screen, 1920 X 720 HD resolution for a better visual experience. It is extremely user friendly & responsive and keeps all your favorite options within fingers reach. The car stereo sound works via aux or bluetooth channel.

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/eedcd049-751c-48d6-8090-c1463194f692.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Add More Functions While Keeping Car OEM Radio System

- -Keep your factory car OEM System:
- like factory radio, GPS navigation, bluetooth, DVD/CD, USB, SD etc.
- Support factory rear view camera
- Support original joystick, factory comand knob, touch mouse and steering wheel control functions.
- -Add More Functions：
- Support Wireless/Wired Carplay,
- Support Wireless/Wired Android Auto,
- Support Wireless Mirrorlink, Airplay for IOS Phone, Autolink for Android Phone
- Navigation/Map, Video, Music, Call, Bluetooth
- Support Touch Hand Control
- Support Siri and Google OK Voice Control

![11](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/532dd551-42da-45d4-8e3a-9ff4e86aa1c7.__CR0,0,970,300_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/c62055e3-3f32-41ea-b933-68f3220aef4c.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Reverse Camera

- Support factory original reverse camera, parking radar
- Support aftermarket reverse camera
- When you put in the reverse, the camera will work automatically
- No support aftermarket front camera and no support aftermarket 360 camera

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/4b2e92d7-9304-4883-a9ad-94de63b8882a.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Support Navigation/Maps App

- CarPlay and Android Auto support third-party navigation apps directly from the Dashboard. So you have even more choices to get where you’d like to go.
- Navigation for apple map, for google map, for waze, for sygic map etc

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/a7f3dcbf-e7a9-4733-ab8d-73bb92f81601.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Support Aux/Bluetooth sound modes

- If your car support both bluetooth calls and music at the same times, you can use car bluetooth for sound. If not, you can only use aux for sound.

![1](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/1a9ef0c6-b879-498d-88f6-2028b5dae7ee.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Before you purchase, please check our website picture to make sure firstly

- Suitable vehicle: Our Carplay Touchscreen fit for Audi A4 A5 2009-2015 year with 3G MMI system.
- Not fit for 2G MMI System.
- Not fit for Audi Q5
- If your car is Q5, please search another link in our store, don’t purchase this link.

- 1\. Perfect Fit for Audi A4 A5 2009-2015 with 3G MMI System: This CarPlay touchscreen for Audi A4 A5 is specially designed for Audi A4 / A5 2009-2015 equipped with factory 3G MMI system. Please compare your original dashboard, screen style, and system version before purchase to ensure correct fitment.
- 2\. 12.3" HD Touchscreen Display – Premium for Audi Screen Upgrade: Upgrade your dashboard with a premium 12.3-inch 1920×720 IPS for Audi touchscreen display upgrade.Delivers: Vivid color performance, Wide viewing angles, Ultra-slim bezel factory-style design.Perfect for a seamless for Audi dashboard screen upgrade with OEM-style integration.
- 3\. Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto Head Unit: Transform your original MMI system into car CarPlay head unit.Enjoy wireless CarPlay and Android Auto for navigation, calls, music, and apps via Siri or Google Assistant.A complete CarPlay retrofit solution for safer and smarter driving.
- 4\. Retain OEM MMI Functions, Seamless Integration:Keep all original car features including factory radio, amplifier, reverse camera, and MMI controls.Switch easily between original system and upgraded interface.This car head unit upgrade integrates perfectly with your OEM system.
- 5\. MirrorLink Function – Smartphone Screen Mirroring Support: Built-in MirrorLink support allows smartphone screen mirroring directly to your car display. Supports app display and media streaming. Enhances entertainment and navigation flexibility.Ideal for drivers seeking multifunction car stereo upgrade.
- 6\. Reverse Camera & Parking System Support: Supports multiple camera systems:OEM factory reverse camera, Aftermarket backup camera,Parking radar display integration.
- 7\. Professional Installation & Technical Support:Installation requires dashboard removal and wiring connection (standard for car stereo upgrade systems).Most issues are caused by incorrect wiring or system mismatch. Our technical team provides full support for troubleshooting. Pro Tip: Always test for Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and MirrorLink functions before reinstalling dashboard to avoid unnecessary returns.
